name: netwatch
description: Real-time network diagnostics in your terminal. One command, zero config, instant visibility.
readme_summary: NetWatch is a real-time network forensics tool that runs in the terminal, offering deep packet inspection, TLS 1.3 decryption, and network intelligence like JA4 fingerprinting and C2 beaconing detection. It provides live triage and evidence capture capabilities without requiring any configuration.
key_features: Built-in network intelligence (port-scan, beaconing, DNS-tunnel detection)
primary_use_case: Live network forensics and incident response in the terminal.
cover_image_prompt: A vigilant digital detective, depicted as a stylized owl with glowing cybernetic eyes, perched on a terminal window. The owl is actively sifting through a stream of colorful, glowing data packets flowing from a network cable. Some packets are being decrypted by the owl's gaze, revealing clear text messages, while others are being categorized with unique digital fingerprint icons (JA4). In the background, subtle alerts flash for suspicious activities like 'beaconing' or 'port scan'. The overall mood is one of intense, focused observation and immediate insight, with the NetWatch logo subtly integrated into the terminal's interface. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a dark, high-tech aesthetic and vibrant data visualizations.

name: VidBee
description: Download videos from almost any website worldwide
readme_summary: VidBee is an open-source video downloader built with Electron and powered by yt-dlp. It allows users to download videos and audio from over 1000 websites with a clean, intuitive interface and features like RSS auto-download.
key_features: Download videos and audios from 1000+ websites worldwide
Built with Electron and powered by yt-dlp
primary_use_case: Downloading videos and audio from a wide variety of online sources.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, stylized robot holding a universal remote control, pointing it at a swirling vortex of diverse media icons (YouTube play button, TikTok logo, Twitter bird, etc.). From the vortex, streams of digital data flow into the robot's 'download' port, transforming into neatly organized video files and audio waveforms. The robot's screen displays a progress bar and the VidBee logo. The background is a clean, modern digital space with subtle circuit patterns. The overall mood is efficient and user-friendly. Style: 3D isometric illustration with bright, clean colors and clear iconography.

name: ai-website-cloner-template
description: Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents
readme_summary: This repository provides a reusable template for cloning any website into a Next.js codebase using AI coding agents. It automates the process of inspecting a site, extracting design elements, and reconstructing its structure.
key_features: Clone any website with one command
Dispatches parallel builders for section reconstruction
Supports multiple AI coding agents (Claude Code recommended)
Generates a clean, modern Next.js codebase
primary_use_case: To automatically reverse-engineer and clone existing websites into a functional Next.js project using AI.
cover_image_prompt: A master architect, holding a blueprint of a modern skyscraper, is magically duplicating it by pointing a futuristic scanner at a photograph of the original building. Digital blueprints and glowing code snippets flow from the scanner onto a blank digital canvas, rapidly constructing an identical, clean, and modern skyscraper. Small UI elements showing design tokens and component specs hover around the architect. The scene is set in a bright, minimalist studio with subtle digital particle effects. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with vibrant colors and clear, crisp details, emphasizing the transformation from a 2D image to a 3D digital structure.

name: marketingskills
description: Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.
readme_summary: This repository provides a collection of specialized marketing skills for AI agents, enabling them to perform tasks like conversion optimization, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering. It's designed for technical marketers and founders to enhance AI coding agent capabilities.
key_features: AI agent skills for marketing tasks
Supports conversion optimization, copywriting, SEO, analytics, growth engineering
Works with Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, and other agents supporting the Agent Skills spec
Skills reference each other for contextual understanding
primary_use_case: To equip AI coding agents with specialized marketing knowledge and workflows, allowing them to assist users with a wide range of marketing tasks.
cover_image_prompt: A master craftsman, embodying an AI agent, meticulously assembling a complex, glowing marketing campaign blueprint. The blueprint is composed of interconnected gears and data streams representing SEO, CRO, and copywriting. Input scrolls of raw data and customer insights are being fed into a central 'AI Brain' device, which then outputs polished, vibrant marketing materials like ad creatives and landing page mockups. The scene is a futuristic workshop with subtle code elements and data visualizations projected on the walls. The overall mood is innovative and productive, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a clean, bright color palette.

name: ml-intern
description: 🤗 ml-intern: an open-source ML engineer that reads papers, trains models, and ships ML models
readme_summary: ml-intern is an open-source AI agent that automates the process of researching, writing, and shipping ML code. It leverages the Hugging Face ecosystem for access to documentation, papers, datasets, and cloud compute, offering both interactive and headless modes for various use cases.
key_features: Autonomous ML code research, writing, and shipping
Integration with Hugging Face ecosystem (docs, papers, datasets, compute)
Support for various LLMs including local models via LiteLLM
Optional sandbox environment for tool execution
Configurable via environment variables and CLI arguments
primary_use_case: To act as an autonomous ML engineer, automating ML development tasks from research to deployment using the Hugging Face ecosystem.
cover_image_prompt: A diligent, anthropomorphic robot intern wearing a lab coat, actively researching on a holographic display showing scientific papers and code snippets. The robot is simultaneously typing on a futuristic keyboard, with glowing data streams flowing from the keyboard towards a "shipped" package icon. In the background, a vast library of digital books and datasets is visible, representing the Hugging Face ecosystem. The scene is set in a clean, modern AI lab with soft, ambient lighting, emphasizing productivity and automation. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with vibrant, tech-inspired colors and subtle UI elements integrated into the environment.
